scripts.build: npm run generate:sitemap && astro build && node ./scripts/check-seo-baseline.mjs && node ./scripts/check-blog-chrome.mjs && node ./scripts/audit-headings.mjs && node ./scripts/check-blog-uniqueness.mjs && node ./scripts/blog-opposing-review.mjs && node ./scripts/check-blog-quality.mjs && node ./scripts/check-geo-lite.mjs && node ./scripts/check-brand-alignment.mjs && echo '_worker.js' > dist/.assetsignore
